SharedItinerary.title: SharedItinerary
SharedItinerary.description: A persistent travel package shared by a user containing custom days and activities

destination.description: Name of the target travel destination

durationDays.description: Length of the trip in days

isFallback.description: Whether the itinerary was generated using offline backup logic

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the itinerary was shared

shared_itineraries/{itineraryId}.description: Publicly readable shared dynamic travel packages
